title: Move Danish Prakash to Maintainer
body:
Given his continued contributions and valuable support with PRs, issue triage, and code review, this is well-deserved.

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body:
@podman-container-tools/podman-maintainers PTAL
@danishprakash Would you mind commenting to confirm you're interested in the position?
I am in favor but will wait on the response from @danishprakash for an official `LGTM`

> Thanks a lot for the consideration. I'm happy to take on this new role and look forward to continuing to contribute to the project!

LGTM, welcome to the team!
